name: pivot
title: Pivot
description: Bulk-change the default macOS app for many file extensions at once.
author: codythatsmee

commands.name: pivot-apps
commands.title: Pivot Apps
commands.description: Pick extensions, pick an app, remap them all.

commands.name: manage-presets
commands.title: Manage Presets
commands.description: Create, edit, duplicate, delete extension presets.

commands.name: undo-last-pivot
commands.title: Undo Last Pivot
commands.description: Restore the previous default handlers from the last pivot.
